positive: A breathtaking symmetrical scene of a mystical lunar eclipse over an ethereal forest landscape. The style is highly detailed neo-Victorian botanical illustration combined with modern graphic art principles. Central composition features giant, stylized glowing fauna (like bioluminescent moths and deer silhouettes) set against gnarled, root-filled trees. The atmosphere is dramatic, bathed in deep twilight blues, midnight purples, and contrasting luminous golds and silvers. The overall aesthetic should use clean, thick silhouettes and geometric patterns, optimized for screen printing on apparel. Focus on high contrast, clean linework, and a cohesive, deep saturation palette. Art Deco meets dark fantasy.
negative: low resolution, blurry, artifact, deformed, messy, dirty, text, watermark, logo, signature, grayscale, noise, ugly, tiling, multiple subjects, bad anatomy
